Vendored Monaco editor runtime assets.

Version:

```text
monaco-editor 0.55.1
```

Source:

```text
https://registry.npmjs.org/monaco-editor/-/monaco-editor-0.55.1.tgz
```

Default runtime path:

```text
wwwroot/vendors/monaco/min/vs
```

The CodeEditor extension loads assets from this static web asset path:

```text
_content/Blazorise.CodeEditor/vendors/monaco/min/vs
```
